name: Chicken Blackberry Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Blackberry Vinegar: Soak the blackberries in vinegar for 3 hours, then pass through a food mill and discard seeds.
2. Chicken: Sauté chicken, remove from pan, drain fat, deglaze with blackberry vinegar. Add chicken and demi-glace, bring to boil. Finish with butter. Serve chicken on plates, sauce over top.
3. Demi-glace: Brown beef bones in stockpot, cover with water, simmer 8-10 hours. Strain liquid. Simmer beef bones with chicken bones, vegetables, seasonings, water for 4-5 hours. Combine liquids, boil, add tomato puree, reduce until coating a spoon. Skim surface during reduction.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
